referral.infoModalDescription: Share the app with friends and get rewarded! When your friend installs and sets up the app, you'll earn 1–3 months of free access. The more friends you invite, the more free months you get.
referral.infoModalRequirement: ⚠️ Important: Your friend must complete the app setup (name, plan selection, and account connection) for the referral to count and for you to earn rewards.
referral.infoModalBenefit1: ✓ Easy to Share: Send a unique referral link via WhatsApp, email, SMS, or social media.
referral.infoModalBenefit2: ✓ Automatic Tracking: Your invite is tracked automatically, so rewards are applied instantly.
referral.infoModalBenefit3: ✓ No Extra Cost: Rewards are free and only require your friends to set up the app.
